title: Telescopic Folding Fishing Landing Net, 1.9m Pole Collapsible Extensible Aluminum long Handle,Stainless Steel Triangular,For Bird Fish Catch,Aquarium,Ponds Floating Objects,Carp Trout
features: 【4-section telescopic design】 WANGDEFU The 4-section telescopic handle extends from 41cm to 150cm, The sturdy aluminum alloy handle can be extended to 190cm, long enough allows the extra reach needed to reach your reach. The durable, tangle-free, coated fine mesh net makes it easy to catch large or small fish.

【Safe catch and quick release】 With intensive honeycomb structure and ideal depth, it is not easy to escape the fish, the net makes it easy to catch and release. The soft and durable net will not hurt the fish scales. The fishing mesh fabric is designed to be less easily hooked, and the locking mechanism for the telescopic pole is not a plastic switch, its special coating prevents the hook points from getting stuck in the net, easy to open and hold .

【Folding handle】 40 cm wide and 38 cm deep, fishing net weight: 0.4 kg, the frame is not heavy. Retractable design, the fishing net folds up at the push of a button for simple storage in your fishing tool bag, on the boat, in your garage or at home. It takes up less space and is easy to store, convenient to carry.

【High-quality material】 The strong hexagonal structure mesh make the fishing net solid and durable. Retractable aluminum pole, non-slip and comfortable rubber handle.Special materials do not harm fish scales and can effectively prevent the growth of bacteria and odor.Made of durable 4mm fishnet nylon mesh, the landing net of wading has a large load capacity, the net can support up to 10 kg and the pole can support up to 4 kg.

【Wide Range of Applications】 Also makes a great net for both beginner and experienced anglers. Suitable for stream fishing, river fishing, lake fishing, boat fishing, etc. great for catching large fish such as carp, trout, etc., as well as small creatures such as birds, butterflies, dragonfly, etc. as well can be used to collect algae from the river.
description: Product Description WANGDEFU Fishing Landing Net with Aluminum Telescoping Pole 75" Long Handle,Rubber Coated Nylon Mesh,for Steelhead,Salmon,Fly,Kayak,Extend to 75 Inch Telescopic fishing net When fishing, it is always advisable, sometimes even mandatory, to have a net with you to get the fish out of the water easily and correctly. Due to its light weight and small size, this foldable fishing net is especially recommended for anglers who often move on foot or change locations. Unfolded length: 190cm Folding length: 57 centimeters Pole length (P fold: 91 cm Pole length (unfolded): 90 centimeters Frame size: 40 x 37 cm Net depth: 23 centimeters Unfolded size: 190 cm Material: Aluminum alloy, rubber handle, galvanized stainless steel mesh frame 190cm telescopic fishing keister The net is telescopic up to 190cm and has High quality nylon mesh. As a result, hooks and triplets can be removed much easier than with a conventional nylon net. high quality Aluminum alloy folding rod Non slip rubber handle Galvanized stainless steel mesh frame Durable nylon made of hexagonal mesh Non absorbent and odorless mesh Prevent hooks from getting stuck Prevent the growth of bacteria and odors Non absorbent coating Will not damage fish scales Practical foldable storage box Top Quality Nylon Mesh Made of 0.32in high quality nylon mesh,will no tangle with hook,waterproof,no harm for fish, prevent net from waterlogging or odor absorption, easy to clean net. The fishing hooks can be easily detached from this nylon net. In addition, the net is easy to clean and dry again quickly. Do No Harm to Fish The nets are gentler on the fishes’ slime coating, letting you catch the fish without injuring them.Non-absorbent coating prevents the net from waterlogging or odor absorption. The nylon net is very easy to clean and offers triplets and hooks no chance of catching. The mesh size is 6mm and not only catches small fish, lobster and small crabs, but also protects the fish scales for safe catching or releasing. The net has a PVC resin adhesive topolyester yarn, even absorbs water and does not become heavy when used. Stable closure On the net head there is a large and sturdy plastic closure. This can be operated with one hand. This results in two fiberglass brackets of the net. How to stretch the fishing net Pull the spring clip down and tighten the tires. Loosen the screw and stretch the rod. How to stretch the fishing net Pull the spring clip down. Pull the spring clip down.
